title: Deadfast 20300502 Ant Killer Plus Bait Station 3 x 4g, Natural
features: EFFECTIVE and SAFE CONTROL - Contains a unique ingredient that transforms into poison when ants consume the bait allowing targeted control and less risk for non-target species
CHILD and PET SAFE - The bait station format and innovative formulation means this product is safe to use around children and pets
TOTAL COLONY CONTROL - The contaminated ants carry the poison into the nest providing total colony control
CONTAINS INDOXACARB - Use Biocides safely Always read the label and product information before use
description: From the manufacturer DEADFAST ANT KILLER BAIT STATION ADVANCED PEST CONTROL SOLUTIONS TO PROTECT YOUR FAMILY AND HOME DEADFAST ANT KILLER BAIT STATION The DEADFAST ANT KILLER PLUS BAIT STATION provides fast control of ants and their nest that works within 24 hours. Our bait stations contain an innovative active ingredient that is only activated once ingested by the ant, providing a safer solution for use around children and pets. The bait stations can be used both indoors and outdoors for effective ant control around the home. Kills ants & the entire nest Innovative Indoxacarb ingredient Gel activates when ants consume the bait Safe to use around children & pets How it Works The DEADFAST ANT KILLER PLUS BAIT STATION contains Indoxacarb, a unique active that is only activated once the ants consume the bait. This makes it safer to use around children and pets. Worker ants will enter the bait station and feed on the gel contained inside. The ants then return to the nest and contaminate the entire colony, leading to total colony control. The bait stations are ready-to-use for easy application both indoors & outdoors. They are also transparent, so you can see the product in action. This also allows you to see when the station is ready to be replaced. How to use GETTING STARTED: • Make sure to remove all available foodstuffs in the infested area. • Place the bait station close to ant trails, ant nests and where ants are active. INDOOR USE: • Secure the bait station on a flat, horizontal or vertical surface close to the ‘ant run’ or nest. • Where there is a heavy infestation, more than one bait station can be used. • Bait stations can be placed along walls, in cabinets, under sinks and refrigerators. OUTDOOR USE: • Secure the bait station on a flat horizontal or vertical surface, close to the ‘ant run’ or nest. Place one bait station per nest or infestation, with up to three bait stations per 10 metre squared.
